title: Houthis Threaten to Widen Iran War by Blocking Israeli Shipping in Red Sea
summary_full: The Yemeni militia group, which is backed by Iran, said it would impose a partial blockade in the waterway, a move that would further strangle supply routes and aggravate the conflict in the Mideast.
summary_public: The Yemeni militia group, which is backed by Iran, said it would impose a partial blockade in the waterway, a move that would further strangle supply routes and aggravate the conflict in the Mideast.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Blocking Israeli Shipping in Red Sea

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: backed by Iran, said it would impose a partial blockade
